name: coc-keeper
description: Call of Cthulhu Keeper mode plugin with structured rules and persistent campaign state. Skills live under ../skills/ (single-track with Codex/Claude Code/Cursor). Portrait generation is Codex-only; Kimi skips that capability.
author: Leehow
skillInstructions: COC Keeper is a Call of Cthulhu 7th edition Keeper plugin. Activate it only after the user explicitly enters COC mode (e.g. "Activate COC mode" / "进入 COC 模式"), then load the canonical skill tree under plugins/coc-keeper/skills/ starting with coc-main/SKILL.md and follow it exactly. All rules, state, and toolbox behavior live in the canonical plugins/coc-keeper/ tree; this manifest is a thin host adapter and must never grow a second skill copy. Investigator portrait generation is Codex-only; on Kimi skip imagegen and continue with the rest of character creation.

interface.shortDescription: Run Call of Cthulhu campaigns inside Kimi.
interface.longDescription: COC Keeper adds an explicit COC mode for immersive Call of Cthulhu 7th edition play, structured rules lookup, JSON campaign state, reusable investigators, module indexing, and deterministic dice/HP/SAN tooling. The single canonical implementation lives under plugins/coc-keeper/ and is shared with Codex, Claude Code, and Cursor; Kimi consumes the same skill tree through this thin adapter. Investigator portrait generation is Codex-only and is skipped on Kimi.
